generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor deployed in permafrost regions to measure ground thermal state with sub-degree accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance SoilMoistureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Capacitance-based soil moisture sensor with 1% volumetric water content resolution for permafrost active layer monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
]

instance GroundDisplacementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Fiber-optic distributed temperature sensing system measuring ground surface displacement with millimeter precision"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GroundDisplacementDataTransmitted
]

instance AtmosphericPressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Barometric pressure sensor with 0.1 hPa accuracy for atmospheric correction in permafrost monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AtmosphericPressureDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor
]

instance SoilMoistureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SoilMoistureSensor
]

instance GroundDisplacementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GroundDisplacementSensor
]

instance AtmosphericPressureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AtmosphericPressureSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PermafrostThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Finite element thermal model simulating permafrost degradation with climate forcing inputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PermafrostDataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SoilFreezingThawingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Phase change model predicting active layer thickness based on temperature and moisture inputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SoilStateAnalysisEnabler
]

instance PermafrostTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series temperature data from permafrost monitoring network with 1-hour resolution"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PermafrostDataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SoilMoistureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Volumetric water content measurements from active layer with daily sampling"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SoilStateAnalysisEnabler
]

instance GroundDisplacementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Surface displacement measurements correlated with thermal contraction/expansion events"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GroundDisplacementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StructuralIntegrityAnalysisEnabler
]

instance AtmosphericCorrectionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Barometric pressure data used for sensor calibration and atmospheric correction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AtmosphericPressureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataQualityAssuranceEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PermafrostDataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based data processing pipeline with NumPy and Pandas for permafrost temperature analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PermafrostMonitoringService, ThermalAnomalyDetectionService
]

instance SoilStateAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB implementation of soil freezing-thawing model with parallel processing support"
    DTDFVocab:enables SoilMoistureVisualizationService, FreezeThawPredictionService
]

instance StructuralIntegrityAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables InfrastructureRiskAssessmentService
]

instance DataQualityAssuranceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated QA system using R statistical package for sensor data validation"

]

// C6: Services
instance PermafrostMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard showing permafrost temperature trends with historical comparison"
    DTDFVocab:provides PermafrostTemperatureInsight
]

instance ThermalAnomalyDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Machine learning service detecting abnormal temperature patterns in permafrost regions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalAnomalyAlertAction
]

instance SoilMoistureVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of soil moisture profiles with depth-time cross-sections"

]

instance FreezeThawPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Seasonal freeze-thaw cycle prediction service with 90% accuracy validation"

]

instance InfrastructureRiskAssessmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance DataQualityReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated report generation system for sensor data quality metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataQualityReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance PermafrostTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current permafrost temperature state with 30-year historical trend comparison"
]

instance ThermalAnomalyAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alert system for temperature anomalies exceeding ±2°C from seasonal norm"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SoilMoistureDistributionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

instance FreezeThawForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted freeze-thaw transition dates with ±5-day confidence intervals"
]

instance InfrastructureRiskAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Critical infrastructure risk alerts based on displacement thresholds"

]

instance DataQualityReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive data quality metrics including completeness, accuracy, and consistency scores"
]
